Search for a student above to view their full results profile and IGCSE-to-A-Level progression.
Each student grade is converted to a global percentile using Pearson Edexcel's published cumulative statistics (international / overseas cohort). A negative shift means the student's global rank dropped at A-Level relative to their IGCSE result. Example: IGCSE grade 8 = top 15% globally → A-Level grade C = top 66% globally = −51pp shift.

Percentile Shift Distribution

Each bar shows how many students shifted by that number of percentile points between their IGCSE and A-Level global ranking in the same subject. Hover a bar to see the students in that band.
